The '''Rover''' was a [[Surveillance tagger/Legends|surveillance tagger]]<ref name="EECore" /> produced by [[Astroserver Industries]]. Unlike its sister design, the [[Trailmaster]], which could only provide directional information, the Rover could provide the range, direction, and speed of its target. It had a range of three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] and cost a thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]<ref name="CRFG" /> It had to be either stowed out of sight or manually clamped to a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]].<ref name="BHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>
